[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111100 5
1 1100101 4
2 1001110 4
3 1111010 5
4 1110111 6
5 0000011 2
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1110111 6 match 4
70 07 0111111 6

72 27 1111111 a
